info.name: Lords' Alliance Vassal
info.description: The Lords' Alliance Vassal background from Forgotten Realms: Heroes of Faerûn.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

ul.li: Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) 2 Javelins, Calligrapher’s Supplies, Fine Clothes, Ink, 5 Ink Pens, Parchment (9 sheets), 13 GP; or (B) 50 GP

description.p: You’ve pledged your loyalty to a member-city of the Lords’ Alliance. As an Alliance agent, you must uphold the tenets of the Alliance and seek to increase safety and prosperity along the Sword Coast . You’re sworn to bring honor and glory to your lord’s house, whether that means securing trade roads for a merchant-lord of Waterdeep or vanquishing monsters upriver of Daggerford. You’ve trained in the arts of swordplay and statecraft and are as deft with a blade as you are with a quill.
Trinket. Roll on the Lords' Alliance Trinkets table to determine what trinket you have from your time with the Lords' Alliance.

tr.td: A scrap from a defeated army’s banner
A bit and bridle engraved with the name of a famous steed
The broken blade of a sword used in a famous battle
The left glove of a lord who went mysteriously missing
An articulated toy horse and knight
A spaulder emblazoned with the insignia of an unidentified lord

setters.set: Strength, Intelligence, Charisma, Lords’ Alliance Agent Feat, Insight and Persuasion Skills, and Calligrapher’s Supplies

select.name: Lords' Alliance Trinkets
select.item: A scrap from a defeated army’s banner
A bit and bridle engraved with the name of a famous steed
The broken blade of a sword used in a famous battle
The left glove of a lord who went mysteriously missing
An articulated toy horse and knight
A spaulder emblazoned with the insignia of an unidentified lord
